overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a flooded urban highway at night during a heavy storm. The player navigates through submerged streets passing industrial drainage pipes, road barriers, and abandoned concrete structures while street lights cast an eerie glow on the murky water.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded multi-lane highway with street lighting

events.description: vehicle passes under concrete overpass, briefly entering covered section before emerging

agents.ego_description: navigating vehicle forward through flooded street, steering toward the overpass

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with green illuminated HUD and speedometer
submerged asphalt road reflecting street lights with rippling water
tall street light illuminating the flooded area with orange glow
sparse dry bushes and weeds along the roadside
construction barriers with orange and white stripes partially submerged
large concrete highway overpass spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a flooded highway at night, approaching and passing under a concrete overpass. Street lights line the left side while orange and white barriers appear on the right, and the dashboard's green HUD remains visible at the bottom of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial flood zone with large drainage pipes

events.description: large industrial concrete pipes and yellow safety barriers appear on the right side
yellow double road lines become visible beneath the flood water

agents.ego_description: steering through flooded industrial area, navigating past concrete infrastructure

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete drainage pipes stacked near the road
wooden barriers painted yellow marking the road edge
faded yellow double lines visible under the murky water

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters an industrial section featuring large concrete drainage pipes and yellow safety barriers on the right. The road markings become visible beneath the water as the vehicle continues forward, leaving the overpass behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded highway passing abandoned concrete structure

events.description: abandoned concrete building structure becomes visible on the right side
red and white marker pole appears ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: driving past abandoned structures in deep water, heading toward marker

entered.detail: derelict concrete building with broken walls partially submerged in water
support pillars for the abandoned structure rising from the water
traffic marker pole with red and white stripes indicating road edge

segments.scene_description: An abandoned concrete structure emerges on the right side as the vehicle drives through deeper water. A red and white marker pole appears ahead, indicating the path through the flooded wasteland.

events.description: passing the red and white marker, entering more open terrain with sparse vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing through open flooded area, navigating by headlights alone

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the marker and continues through an open flooded wasteland. Sparse vegetation lines both sides of the submerged road as the journey continues into the darkness with only the vehicle headlights illuminating the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a flooded urban highway that gradually transitions into a desolate, open wasteland at night. It begins by driving under a concrete overpass, where street lights and orange barriers flank the vehicle and a green HUD glows on the dashboard. As the vehicle leaves the overpass behind, the scene shifts into an industrial zone characterized by large concrete drainage pipes and yellow safety barriers, with road markings flickering beneath the murky water. The environment then opens up as an abandoned concrete structure emerges on the right, leading the camera toward a red and white marker pole that guides the way through the deepening flood. Finally, the vehicle passes the marker and pushes forward into a dark, expansive wasteland where sparse vegetation lines the submerged road and only the headlights pierce the gloom.
